title: Show Sussy Stew Effects
description: Easily tell what flavour your sussy stew is!
body: This resource pack lets you easily see what potion effect your suspicious stew will give you. If installed you will need Optifine or CITResewn (or any other mod that lets you use CIT without Optifine). Have fun being knowing not to eat that wither suspicious stew your friend gave you! Works for all versions that have suspicious stew!
